PostToolUse.description: Layer 1（确定性）：文件编辑后自动执行质量检查（Lint / 密钥扫描），失败时阻断

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');const idx='.agent/context-index.json';const arch='.agent/archive';if(!fs.existsSync(idx))process.exit(0);const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(idx,'utf8'));const refs='.agent/references';if(!fs.existsSync(refs)){process.exit(0);}const onDisk=fs.readdirSync(refs,{recursive:true}).filter(f=>f.endsWith('.md')).map(f=>path.basename(f,'.md'));let fixed=0;data.modules=data.modules.filter(m=>{if(!onDisk.includes(m.module)){fixed++;return false;}return true;});if(fixed>0){data._meta.last_updated=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];fs.writeFileSync(idx,JSON.stringify(data,null,2));console.log('[Cortex] L0 熵修复：移除 '+fixed+' 个已删除模块的索引条目');}"

PostCommit.description: L0 熵治理：提交后自动清理 context-index.json 中已删除模块的条目（< 1 秒，不阻塞）
Graphify: after commit, incrementally update graphify-out/graph.json; skip silently when not installed or not initialized

hooks.command: node -e "const f='.agent/plans/task-progress.md'; const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync(f)){console.log('[Cortex] Task progress loaded: '+f);}"

SessionStart.description: 会话启动时提示加载任务进度文件
